creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

Let’s face it- Orlando traffic sucks! For your next Florida vacation, visit these five places instead! 

1. Lake Morton in Lakeland
2. Ringling Museum in Sarasota
3. Sparkman Wharf in Tampa
4. Boca Grande on Gasparilla Island
5. Bean Point on Anna Maria Island 

Have you been to any of these places?? Let me know in the comments! 

#hiddengemsflorida #tampaflorida #sarasotaflorida #annamariaisland #bocagrande

transcription.text: For your next Florida vacation, skip Orlando and visit these five places instead. Lakeland, otherwise known as Swan City. Lakeland loves their swans and it all began in 1957 when Queen Elizabeth gifted two swans to the city. Go to Lake Morton to feed the cute white ducks and pet the baby swans. Ringling Museum in Sarasota, Florida. This property is absolutely stunning with a massive art collection that rivals the Louvre. I've always felt like I've stepped right into Europe when I visit here. Don't miss out on exploring through the Banyan Trees, too. Sparkman Wharf in Tampa, Florida. This is an outdoor waterfront entertainment area with cool restaurants, a beer garden, and street food stands. It also has lots of outdoor seating and games. Pro tip, take the free TECO trolley from Sparkman Wharf to many other Tampa attractions, too. Boca Grande, check out the abandoned dilapidated train tracks that run over the shallow waters. You're almost guaranteed to see dolphins or manatees here. You can drop in a kayak or paddleboard for a close-up view. Bean Point Beach on Anna Maria Island for some of the bluest water and whitest sand. This is one of my favorite beaches in Florida. Save this post and send it to someone you would want to visit one of these amazing Florida destinations with.
